reviews.comment:
Trato cordial y buena atención,. Respecto a los precios de las naftas, si bien son inferiores al resto de las estaciones de servicio de la zona, la diferencia es muy poca y solo se hace una diferencia considerable si se carga combustible una o más veces diarias, sobre todo teniendo en cuenta las largas colas que se forman en todo momento para realizar carga de combustible; normalmente las colas son superiores a los cinco vehículos y las cargas no son muy rápidas.

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service and good attention. Regarding gasoline prices, while they are lower than other service stations in the area, the difference is very small and only becomes significant if you fill up once or more a day, especially considering the long lines that form at all times; the lines are usually longer than five vehicles and the pumps are not very fast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3d3FyQ01nEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar un poco lento los despachadores y sin hacer nada ni los vidrios te limpian solo se la pasan hablando entre ellos, horas pico se llena mucho de autos, el lugar para compras es algo chico y se complica estar ai.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place, but the attendants are a bit slow and don't do anything; they don't even clean the windows, they just spend their time talking amongst themselves. During rush hour it gets very crowded with cars, the shopping area is rather small and it's difficult to navigate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dk1MMVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Como dicen muchos, la atención fue buena. Empleados amables pero es lo único rescatable del lugar. Luego de unos 20 minutos de cola veo que de 4 surtidores solamente hay 2 funcionando porque a la otra isla de dos le están pintando el zócalo. Además no aceptan pago con Mercadopago escaneando el código QR tan promocionado por YPF. Sres. del ACA cuándo se van a aggiornar?

(Translated by Google)
As many have said, the service was good. Friendly employees, but that's the only redeeming feature of the place. After waiting in line for about 20 minutes, I noticed that only two of the four pumps were working because they were painting the baseboard of the other two. Furthermore, they don't accept MercadoPago payments by scanning the QR code that YPF so heavily promotes. When are you going to update your practices, ACA?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnX0pxbmVBEAE
